---
title: ". "
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: "plot/module1.png"
  data-background-size: "cover"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: [simple, custom.scss]
    preview-links: true
    code-fold: false
    code-summary: "code"
    chalkboard: true
    slide-number: true
    footer: "Econ 148: Analytical and Statistical packages for economists 1"
engine: knitr
from: markdown+emoji
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(comment = "", collapse = TRUE)

## working directory
setwd("D:/OneDrive - KMITL/VSU/lectures/econ148-analytical-stat-package/github-repository/econ148-lecture/module-1")

## Libraries
library(tidyverse)

```


## Topics

- Methods of data collection

- Sampling design in surveys

- Measurement issues in survey research

- Questionnaire construction

- Basics of interviewing

- Creating a codebook

- Data entry


# Methods of data collection


##
